task_completion.description: Navigate to the Accounts module list view.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CRM web interface is open and displaying the Accounts list view.

task_completion.description: Filter the accounts to show only those in the Technology industry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search or filter is applied for Industry equals 'Technology', and the resulting list displays accounts with 'Technology' in the Industry column.

task_completion.description: Select the filtered Technology accounts for mass update.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkboxes next to the individual Technology accounts, or the 'select all' checkbox in the list header, are checked.

task_completion.description: Configure the mass update tool to change the Rating to Hot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Mass Update' panel or form is visible on the screen, and the 'Rating' field within this panel is set to 'Hot'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Technology accounts have been successfully updated to a Hot rating.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Accounts list view shows the Technology accounts (exactly 6 accounts) with their 'Rating' column now displaying 'Hot'.

integrity.description: The agent used the CRM graphical user interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the CRM, rather than terminal commands, SQL queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent utilized the mass update feature as instructed, rather than editing accounts individually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Mass Update' panel is visible in at least one screenshot, proving the bulk tool was used instead of opening each account's edit view.

integrity.description: The final results are genuine application states.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using browser developer tools (Inspect Element) to fake the 'Hot' text, or typing the expected outcome into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 6 accounts in the database with the industry 'Technology'. The target rating to apply is 'Hot'. The VLM should verify that exactly 6 accounts were updated to 'Hot' using the mass update feature, and no non-Technology accounts were modified.
